settings.heading: Shipping & Returns
settings.content:
Orders are processed within 5–7 business days and delivered in 5–8 business days (or 2–3 days with expedited shipping). We ship to all 50 U.S. states via UPS, FedEx, or USPS, and tracking is emailed once your order ships.

Returns are accepted within 30 days for unused, unopened items in original packaging. Perishable, opened, or clearance items are not eligible unless defective. Approved returns include a free prepaid label, and refunds are issued within 5–10 business days after inspection.

settings.heading: Nutritional Information
settings.content: Detailed nutritional information is available on the product packaging. Please check the label for allergen information, ingredients list, and dietary specifications.

settings.heading: Storage Instructions
settings.content: For best quality, store according to the instructions on the product packaging. Most fresh produce should be refrigerated and consumed within the recommended time frame.
